verses.text: Topa aw, kong paunate hong ngai in la, ka hong thumnate hong thudon in
Ka kumpi leh ka Pasian aw, nangma tungah hong thum ka hih manin ka kikona aw hong ngai in
Topa aw, zingsang simin ka aw nong za a, zingsang simin nangma-a' dingin biakna bawlin kong ngak hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh gitlohna lamsang a deih Pasian na hi kei a, siatna pen tawlkhat zong nang tawh a omkhawm thei ahi kei hi
A kisathei mite nangma mit tawh kituaklo a, siatna a bawlte khempeuh nangmah in na mudah hi
Zuauthu a gen mite nangmah in na susia hi. Topa in mi thahnopna lungsim leh mi khemnopna lungsim a neite a mudah hi
Kei ahih leh a kicing itna kip suangin na inn sungah ka tum ding a, nangmah zahtakna tawh kunin a siangtho na biakinn lam nga-in kong bia ding hi
Topa aw, gal tampi nei ka hih manin na thumanna tawh kei hong makaih in la, keima mai-ah na lampi tangsak in
Bang hang hiam cih leh amau sungah thuman omlo hi. Amau lungsimah siatna bek ngaihsun uh a, amau' gawlgui pen a kihongsa hankhuk tawh kibang hi. A kam uh tawh mawk phat uh hi
Pasian aw, a mawhna uh amau mah thuaksak in la, amau' thu mah tawh amaute puksak in. Amaute in nangmah hong lehdo uh ahih manin amau' mawhna tampite hangin amaute paiikhia in
Ahih hangin nang hong belte khempeuh lungdamsak in la, nuamna la sasak tawntung in. Nangma min a deihte nangma hangin gualzo-in a lungdam theihna dingun amaute na hu hi
Topa aw, thuman mi thupha na pia a, lum tawh dal bangin deihsakna tawh na dal hi.
